original_selected_pddl:
(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13)
  (:init
    (arm-empty)
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on b5
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    ;; Tower 4 (height 3): b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on b8
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    ;; Tower 5 (height 4): b10 on table, b11 on b10, b12 on b11, b13 on b12
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (clear b13)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted (height 1): b1 still alone
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b3 on table, b2 on b3
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b6 on table, b5 on b6, b4 on b5
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b9 on table, b8 on b9, b7 on b8
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (clear b7)
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b13 on table, b12 on b13, b11 on b12, b10 on b11
      (on-table b13)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
    )
  )
)

The task says "invert each individual stack" - meaning each tower's block order is reversed, but the blocks stay as a group. The candidate already does this. However, the verifier score is only 0.4468, suggesting something is wrong.

The issue might be that the goal is over-specified. By specifying `on-table` and `clear` for each tower, we're constraining which blocks must be table blocks and top blocks. But the task only says to invert each stack - it doesn't require specific `on-table` or `clear` predicates if they're implied. Actually, in blocksworld, those are necessary for a complete state description.

original_selected_pddl:
(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19)
  (:init
    ; Tower 1: single block (height 1)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ; Tower 2: single block (height 1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ; Tower 3: height 4 (b3 on table, b4 on b3, b5 on b4, b6 on top)
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ; Tower 4: height 4 (b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on b8, b10 on top)
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)
    
    ; Tower 5: height 9 (b11 on table, b12 on b11, ..., b19 on top)
    (on-table b11)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (clear b19)
    
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ; Tower 1: single block stays the same
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ; Tower 2: single block stays the same
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ; Tower 3 inverted: b6 on table, b5 on b6, b4 on b5, b3 on top
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)
      
      ; Tower 4 inverted: b10 on table, b9 on b10, b8 on b9, b7 on top
      (on-table b10)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (clear b7)
      
      ; Tower 5 inverted: b19 on table, b18 on b19, ..., b11 on top
      (on-table b19)
      (on b18 b19)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (clear b11)
    )
  )
)

original_selected_pddl:
(define (problem gripper-problem)
  (:domain gripper-strips)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects
    rooma roomb - object
    ball1 ball2 - object
    left right gripper1 gripper2 gripper3 - object
  )
  (:init
    (room rooma)
    (room roomb)
    (ball ball1)
    (ball ball2)
    (gripper left)
    (gripper right)
    (gripper gripper1)
    (gripper gripper2)
    (gripper gripper3)
    (at-robby rooma)
    (carry ball1 left)
    (carry ball2 right)
    (free gripper1)
    (free gripper2)
    (free gripper3)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      (at ball1 roomb)
      (at ball2 roomb)
    )
  )
)
